
# Lecture Summary

## Purpose
Turn lecture material into structured notes.

## Output Format

### Topic
The main subject or title of the lecture.

### Key Points
- Essential concepts covered
- Critical takeaways
- Important theories or principles

### Definitions
- Define specialized terminology
- Explain key concepts introduced

### Examples
- Practical applications
- Use cases or scenarios
- Code samples (if applicable)

### Summary
Brief overview connecting all sections and main conclusions.

---

## Usage
Use this template to create consistent, well-organized lecture notes from course materials.
